ASBESTOS JURY TRIAL BRAYTON GROUPS 308 AND 332 SET FOR JAN-18-2006 CONTINUED TO JAN-23-2006 AT 1:30 PM IN 602 - JUDGE D. MITCHELL, REPORTER R. FUNG, CLERK I. HAMMER AND ATTORNEYS PRESENT AS INDICATED ON WORD MINUTES. COURT AND COUNSEL DISCUSSED PRELIMINARY ISSUES AND TWO DFT. ATTYS OBJECTED TO NOT HAVING HAD INPUT INTO CONTENT OF JURY QUESTIONNAIRE. NO PER DIEMS DUE FOR THIS DATE AND NO JURY FEES DUE FOR GROUPS 308 AND 332.

ASBESTOS JURY TRIAL SET FOR JAN-23-2006 CONTINUED TO JAN-24-2006 AT 1:30 PM IN 602 - JUDGE D. MITCHELL, REPORTER R. FUNG, CLERK I. HAMMER, ATTYS. & PROSPECTIVE JURORS PRESENT. COURT HEARD DFTS. OBJECTIONS TO CONSOLIDATION & USE OF JURY PANEL OUT OF PRESENCE OF JURY AND DENIED THEM. JURY VOIR DIRE BEGAN. PLNTFS OWE $140 PER DIEMS AND DFTS. OWE $140 PER DIEMS. PLNTFS. OWE $807.50 JURY FEES.

ASBESTOS JURY TRIAL SET FOR JAN-24-2006 CONTINUED TO JAN-26-2006 AT 9:30 AM IN 602 - SEE MINUTES IN LEAD CASES 320697 (BRAYTON GROUP 308 & 406249 (BRAYTON GROUP 332). JUDGE D. MITCHELL, REPORTER R. FUNG, CLERK I. HAMMER, ATTYS. & PROSPECTIVE JURORS PRESENT FOR VOIR DIRE. PLNTFS. OWES $580 JURY FEES AND PLNTFS OWE $280 PER DIEMS AND DFTS OWE $280 PER DIEMS FOR THIS DATE.

ASBESTOS JURY TRIAL SET FOR JAN-26-2006 CONTINUED TO JAN-30-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN 602 - JUDGE D. MITCHELL, REPORTER R. FUNG, CLERK I. HAMMER, ATTORNEYS AND PROSPECTIVE JURORS PRESENT. JURY VOIR DIRE, JURY AND ALTERNATES SWORN. PLNTFS OWE $140 PER DIEMS AND DFTS. OWE $140 PER DIEMS. PLNTFS ALSO OWE $385.00 JURY FEES FOR THIS DATE.

ASBESTOS JURY TRIAL SET FOR JAN-30-2006 CONTINUED TO JAN-31-2006 AT 9:30 AM IN 602 - JUDGE D. MITCHELL, CLERK I. HAMMER AND PLAINTIFFS' COUNSEL A. CHEW PRESENT. MR CHEW INFORMED THE COURT CASES IN BRAYTON 308 & 332 HAD ALL SETTLED. JURY TO RETURN TO DEPT. 602 TOMORROW & MR. CHEW TO BE PRESENT WHEN COURT DISCHARGES JURY. NO PER DIEMS OR JURY FEES DUE FOR TODAY (1/30/06)
TRIAL CONCLUDED. IN 5 DAYS

REMOVED FROM ASBESTOS JURY TRIAL CALENDAR ON JAN-31-2006 IN DEPT. 602 - JUDGE D. MITCHELL, REPORTER R. FUNG, CLERK I. HAMMER, A. CHEW, ESQ., PLNTFS' ATTY. AND JURY PRESENT. COUNSEL INFORMED COURT ALL CASES IN BRAYTON GROUPS 308 AND 332 SETTLED (MINUTES IN LEAD CASES 320697 & 406249). THE COURT THANKED AND DISCHARGED THE JURY. NO PER DIEMS DUE. PLNTFS.
